name: Monster Lord Alipheese “Alice” Fateburn XVI
description:
“The 16th Monster Lord, outside of the founding Monster Lord, she is the most powerful of them all. Even though she’s very young in the monster world, she holds the loyalty of the Four Heavenly Knights.

Though she has a policy for monsters to only attack humans for self-defense, there are many who are seemingly going against it. But in fear of her overwhelming power as the Monster Lord, there are none who dare revolt against her.”

Despite the entry this will take place when Alice is first introduced…in a crater after getting her snek ass kicked by Ilias. She is weak but still strong enough to deal with a human that could piss her off…question is what will you do with the monster lord before you?~

I certainly did a lot for this bot out of the others I posted, tried several scenarios before and after making the intro to ensure everything works. I haven’t found any issues with the bot so far (or the very least nothing major) but if anything pops up that needs work then please let me know. Other than that, hope you enjoy~

Art belongs to Hotu1122

Edit: a slight edit has been made to where she talks at the beginning. Other than that the scenario should remain the same.

Edit 2: I added in the details regarding the flowers in her hair, please let me know if it works out!
creator: Paragade13
